home.subtitle: Beachfront dining, handcrafted cocktails, and modern Greek cuisine on the shores of Agia Fotia, Chios.

restaurant.title: Fine Dining
restaurant.subtitle: Culinary Excellence
restaurant.description: Experience Mediterranean cuisine reimagined at Saint Fire Chios. Our expert chefs craft each dish with precision, using the finest local ingredients and modern techniques to create unforgettable dining experiences.

greek_salad.title: Sea Symphony Kritharoto
greek_salad.description: Fresh prawns, octopus, and calamari come together with large orzo in a rich tomato saganaki sauce, delicately infused with Chian souma. Finished with fresh herbs and PDO feta, this signature dish captures the essence of Greek seaside dining.

chicken_sandwich.title: Saint Fire Greek Salad
chicken_sandwich.description: Our signature Greek salad celebrates the flavors of Chios with vine-ripened tomatoes, crisp cucumber, roasted peppers, onion, Chian throumba olives, and PDO feta. Sea fennel, barley rusks, oregano, apple cider vinegar, and extra virgin olive oil complete this vibrant Mediterranean classic.

burger.title: Fresh Fish Fillet
burger.description: Featuring the freshest fish of the day, this elegant dish is served with smooth celery root purée, butter-glazed vegetables, and a fragrant lemon-oil dressing. A contemporary expression of Mediterranean cuisine, showcasing the purity of fresh seafood and seasonal produce.

beach_club.title: Beach Club
beach_club.subtitle: Your Private Paradise
beach_club.description: Experience the ultimate beach luxury at Saint Fire Beach Club. With 75 exclusive umbrella sets arranged in perfect harmony along our pristine beach, each spot offers an unparalleled view of the Aegean Sea.

seating.title: Premium Seating
seating.description: Luxurious sunbeds and umbrellas arranged in 5 rows of 15, ensuring perfect views and privacy

service.title: Beach Service
service.description: Dedicated attendants serving refreshing cocktails and light meals directly to your sunbed

vip.title: VIP Reservations
vip.description: Reserve your sunbed in advance and arrive to a guaranteed spot. Pure relaxation from the moment you arrive.

bar.title: Bar & Nightlife
bar.subtitle: Ignite Your Night
bar.description: As the sun sets, Saint Fire transforms into the island's most exclusive nightlife destination. Experience craft cocktails, world-class DJs, and an atmosphere that captures the essence of Mediterranean nights.

mediterranean_fire.title: Pomegranate Negroni
mediterranean_fire.description: Inspired by Mediterranean sunsets, this vibrant cocktail combines pomegranate gin, vermouth, Campari, pomegranate cordial, and ruby port for a bold harmony of sweet fruit, refined bitterness, and velvety depth.

aegean_sunset.title: Mango Mirage V2
aegean_sunset.description: A sun-soaked combination of gin, prosecco, elderflower liqueur, and luscious mango, lifted by sparkling mango soda. Fresh, tropical, and effortlessly vibrant—capturing the spirit of endless Mediterranean summers.

golden_hour.title: Chios Sour
golden_hour.description: A tribute to Chios in a glass. Homemade citron vodka and authentic mastiha liqueur meet fresh lemon and ripe raspberries, creating a vibrant sour with bright citrus character, delicate sweetness, and a smooth Mediterranean finish.

hotel.title: Luxury Stays
hotel.subtitle: Experience Pure Luxury
hotel.description: Immerse yourself in the epitome of Mediterranean luxury at Saint Fire Hotel. Each room offers stunning sea views, premium amenities, and unparalleled comfort for an unforgettable stay in Chios.

deluxe.title: Deluxe Sea View
deluxe.description: A beautifully appointed room featuring a private balcony with sweeping views of the Aegean Sea, refined interiors, and premium amenities for a truly restful stay.

executive.title: Junior Suite
executive.description: An elegantly designed suite with a separate living area, private hot tub, and premium amenities — perfect for those seeking comfort and indulgence by the sea.

presidential.title: Executive Suite
presidential.description: Our most prestigious accommodation, featuring a private pool, panoramic Aegean views, a private terrace, and an elevated level of luxury and personalized service.
